channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Millions of Americans may soon discover they are Canadian through ancestry
item.description: Canadian ancestry could grant citizenship to millions of Americans.

item.title: All aboard the freelance revolution
item.description: How to attract and onboard independent talent to unlock business agility.

item.title: People with temporary protected status are $29 billion economic force
item.description: Supreme Court to weigh TPS fate for Haitians and Syrians as report quantifies impact.

item.title: The older you get, the harder it is to make friends at work
item.description: After-work drinks bond colleagues in 20s and 30s; older age brings different circumstances.

item.title: Lowe's faces pressure to cut ties with Flock Safety over privacy concerns
item.description: Surveillance company makes cameras, drones, and automated license plate readers.

item.title: Microsoft makes first-ever move to cut workforce amid AI shift
item.description: Company offers voluntary buyouts to select employees, CNBC reports.

item.title: Pope Leo carries photo of slain Muslim boy: 'I cannot be in favor of war'
item.description: Pontiff also suggests U.S. church is excessively focused on sex.

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, says new model intuits what you need before you ask
item.description: ChatGPT will give 'smarter and more concise answers.'

item.title: Great websites take shape twice: first in strategy, then in design
item.description: Best digital experiences begin with strategic clarity and iterative design.

item.title: Meta, Microsoft look to trim workforces amid heavy AI spending
item.description: Meta plans 10% cut; Microsoft offers voluntary buyouts.

item.title: Esther Wojcicki, 'Godmother of Silicon Valley,' shares secret to raising leaders
item.description: Wojcicki takes inspiration from her daughters' public failures and pivots to success.

item.title: Tesla places $2 billion bet on AI hardware with almost no details
item.description: Company quietly slipped deal into recent regulatory filing.

item.title: Billionaire takes Trump's crypto venture to court over $320M freeze
item.description: Entrepreneur claims World Liberty Financial illegally froze his tokens.

item.title: Viral JetBlue blunder sparks surveillance pricing fears
item.description: Customer interaction leads to suspicions of upcharging based on browsing.

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, a more powerful engine for coding, science, and work
item.description: New system enables more powerful Codex coding agent.
